data.title: allwhere partners with Jamf for zero-touch Apple device management, streamlining deployment globally.
data.description: In New York on December 12, 2025, allwhere, a worldwide platform specializing in employee laptop retrieval and IT asset management, announced a recent collaboration with Jamf. This integration aims to provide organizations with an efficient solution for automating the global deployment, administration, and recovery of Apple devices. The partnership is expected to enhance convenience for businesses by streamlining processes and ensuring seamless coordination for managing IT assets on a large scale.
French Presidency Official: Ukrainians have made it clear that they will not cede territory.

French Presidency Official: Discussing how a type of NATO Article 5 with US involvement would work as part of Ukraine's security guarantees.

data.title: The Ademi Firm is investigating Katapult Holdings Inc. for fair price for public shareholders after transaction with Aaron's Company.
data.description: In Milwaukee on December 12, 2025, The Ademi Firm has initiated an investigation into Katapult (Nasdaq: KPLT) for suspected breaches of fiduciary duty and potential legal violations concerning its recent transaction with The Aaron's Company Inc. and CCF Holdings LLC. For more information on how to participate in the investigation, visit the provided link.

data.title: VivoPower (VVPR) stock rises after joint venture with Ripple Labs, targeting Ripple exposure through $300 million investment.
data.description: VivoPower International PLC (NASDAQ: VVPR) saw an increase in shares on Friday following the announcement of a significant digital-asset joint venture related to Ripple Labs. This venture allows VivoPower to access private Ripple equity without using its own capital, focusing on South Korean investors. Vivo Federation, a digital asset subsidiary of VivoPower, entered a joint venture agreement with Lean Ventures, a licensed asset manager in Seoul. The collaboration aims to create a special-purpose investment vehicle targeting Ripple Labs with a capacity of holding up to $300 million.

data.title: Public Transport Smart Cards market shifting from magnetic stripe to contactless cards. Key players include Infineon, NXP Semiconductors; trends predict growth till 2025 - Business Wire.
data.description: A recent report on the public transport smart cards market, added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings, highlights the evolving landscape and trends in technology. Over the years, there has been a notable transition from magnetic stripe cards to more advanced options such as contactless smart cards, RFID smart cards, and smart chip cards. This shift signifies a move towards enhanced security and efficiency within the market. Magnetic stripe cards, previously the norm, are being replaced by these more secure technologies.

data.title: XRP expands to Solana with regulated wXRP via Hex Trust, totaling $100 million. Ripple obtains crucial banking license.
data.description: wXRP, a 1:1-backed wrapped XRP issued by Hex Trust, has expanded XRP's reach to Solana and other networks, enhancing its liquidity and utility in the multichain space. This new wrapped asset allows for safe cross-chain movement of XRP and seamless integration into DeFi, eliminating the need for unreliable third-party bridges. wXRP launches with a significant value, boasting over $100 million in total assets. For more details, visit a financial news platform.

data.title: MotorCity Dark Horse Racing acquired in November, joins META's LLama Startup AI Program, competing in IMSA and FIA.
data.description: In November, MotorCity Dark Horse Racing was acquired, signifying a new chapter for the team in the world of motorsports. The team, known for competing in the IMSA (International Motor Sports Association) and FIA, will now be undergoing changes following the acquisition. This move comes as the team prepares for its upcoming racing season in 2026.

data.title: JIUZI HOLDINGS, INC. to offer $4.0M through sale of 1.6M Class A ordinary shares at $2.5 each in a registered direct offering. (total amount, shares, price)
data.description: In Hangzhou on December 12, 2025, JIUZI HOLDINGS, INC. (NASDAQ: JZXN) announced a definitive agreement with an investor to sell 1,600,000 of the Company’s Class A ordinary shares at $2.5 per share in a registered direct offering. Alternatively, pre-funded warrants could be purchased in place of shares at the same price, with an exercise price of $0.078 per share.

data.title: Global video advertising agency market to grow at 8% CAGR from 2025-2031. Drivers: demand for digital advertising, video marketing, and consumer engagement.
data.description: In Dublin, a recent report on the video advertising agency market has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report highlights trends, forecasts, and competitive analysis up to 2031. It predicts a growth rate of 8% for the global video advertising agency market between 2025 and 2031. This growth is primarily attributed to the surge in digital advertising demand, the widespread integration of video marketing strategies, and the escalating engagement of consumers with online video content. data.title: Lululemon (NASDAQ: LULU ) surpasses Q4 estimates with shares up, featuring third-quarter earnings of $2.59 per share. Analysts revise targets.
data.description: Lululemon Athletica Inc (NASDAQ: LULU) witnessed a surge in shares following its optimistic third-quarter earnings report. The company's stock showed strong momentum with various analysts weighing in on the reasons behind LULU’s gains. BofA Securities' Lorraine Hutchinson, while maintaining a Neutral rating, raised the price target from $185 to $220. Dana Telsey from Telsey Advisory Group reiterated a Market Perform rating and increased the price target from $200 to $215. Janine Stichter of BTIG reaffirmed a Buy rating with a price target of $303. BofA Securities noted that Lululemon Athletica surpassed expectations with earnings of $2.59 per share, although 2025 estimates remain unchanged due to elevated spending in the fourth quarter. For further details, refer to the complete article available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Nasdaq lags Dow as Tesla rival rises on AI chip news; Broadcom stock plunges on earnings in stock market today.
data.description: Today, the stock market experienced a downturn with the Dow Jones index decreasing. AI stocks also struggled, particularly with Broadcom stock plummeting after reporting earnings. The Nasdaq index lagged behind the Dow, while a Tesla competitor saw a rise in stock value following news about advancements in AI chip technology.

data.title: TV host Jim Cramer recommends Capital One Financial Corp. (NYSE: COF) as the cheapest bank stock with the most potential for upside.
data.description: Financial guru Jim Cramer is reemphasizing his confidence in the banking sector, citing undervalued stocks as a prime opportunity. During a recent segment on CNBC's "Mad Money," Cramer highlighted the attractive valuations within the industry, singling out Virginia-based Capital One Financial Corp. (NYSE: COF) as particularly promising. As the sixth-largest bank in the U.S., Capital One is positioned as the most discounted among its peers, offering significant growth potential. Cramer disclosed his longstanding support for this stock, affirming his positive outlook with a reference to a favorable 60-point increase. This endorsement comes amidst a broader discussion on the affordability of bank stocks, as Cramer asserts that Capital One stands out as a top investment choice.

data.title: Zillow removes score predicting climate risks from home listings due to inaccuracy, impacting real estate industry and homeowners.
data.description: Numerical ratings were designed to forecast a property's vulnerability to fires, floods, and storms. However, there have been disputes from individuals in the real estate sector and property owners, labeling the ratings as unreliable.
